---
title: "Count Spotless Day : 2000-2025"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

```{r,message=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# Example: read your Excel file
df <- readxl::read_excel("sdic_isn.xlsx")
```
```{r}
# Count days per month where ISN == 0
result <- df %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(Ymd),                 # ensure date format
    year_month = floor_date(date, "month")
  ) %>%
  filter(ISN == 0) %>%
  group_by(year_month) %>%
  summarise(days_isn_zero = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year_month)

summary(result)
```

# Plot Spotless Days

```{r}
ggplot(result) + geom_histogram(aes(x=days_isn_zero))
ggplot(result) + geom_boxplot(aes(x=days_isn_zero))
```
# Count by Month

```{r}
ggplot(result) + geom_col(aes(x=year_month,y=days_isn_zero))
```
```{r}
result |> filter(year_month >='2014-01-01') |>
ggplot() + geom_col(aes(x=year_month,y=days_isn_zero))
```
